waveTenantCohorts.cohortSelector: tenant == tenant-demo-gp AND registered_patients.synthetic == true AND staff.role IN (clinician, care_navigator, support_analyst) AND cohort.wave == 1
waveTenantCohorts.regroupingPolicy: selector digest must be republished before tenant regrouping can widen scope

waveTenantCohorts.cohortSelector: tenant == tenant-demo-gp AND wave1.settled == true AND pharmacy_projection.state == exact
waveTenantCohorts.regroupingPolicy: blocked until pharmacy projection and reference-data rollback are exact
blocked if the tenant grouping changes without a new selector digest

waveTenantCohorts.cohortSelector: tenant == tenant-demo-gp AND nhs_app_limited_release_approval == true AND sample_users <= agreed_plan
waveTenantCohorts.regroupingPolicy: NHS App cohort remains zero until Phase 7 channel authority is current

waveTenantCohorts.cohortSelector: tenant == tenant-demo-gp AND staff.role IN (clinical_safety_officer, clinician_superuser) AND assistive.mode == visible_summary
waveTenantCohorts.regroupingPolicy: all-staff assistive exposure requires a separate slice contract

pre-approval review, daily watch update, exit review
supplier coordination, monthly data pack, route-change notice
pre-approval review, daily watch update, exit review

tenant eligible for patient routes but not pharmacy dispatch
